name: Veggie Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh spinach, cooked, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lentils, bread crumbs, egg whites, spinach, carrot, onion, cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Shape into 6 equal patties. Place on a baking sheet. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
2. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add burger patties; cook for 6 minutes, turning once halfway through cooking to ensure even browning.
3. Meanwhile, if preparing the mayonnaise (optional), mix together light mayonnaise, mustard, and catsup in a small bowl until well combined.
4. Place patties on whole-wheat buns and serve with mayonnaise, if using.
